'''âh-w-b-g''' ('''kahawbegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:janney|janney]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:janney|janney]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-w-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kahawbegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihawbegoko|thihawbegoko]] || [[word:jihawbegoko|jihawbegoko]] || [[word:shihawbegoko|shihawbegoko]] || [[word:kihawbegoko|kihawbegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
